docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ZAWAIDEH, JEHAD AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOWAN, JARAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-23-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JEHAD ZAWAIDEH. LATE APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JARAD MCCOWAN WHO ARRIVED AFTER CALLING OF THE CASE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANT HIS CLAIM WITH NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEBRUARY 23, 2017 AT 3:30 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $71.00) SERVED NOV-15-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOWAN, JARAD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-04-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JEHAD ZAWAIDEH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JARAD MCCOWAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAWAIDEH, JEHAD AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOWAN, JARAD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-29-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAWAIDEH, JEHAD
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-17-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-29-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 8/31/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
